assessment_objectives.objective: authorization or approval processes for network services are defined.
personnel or roles to be alerted upon the detection of network services that have not been authorized or approved by authorization or approval processes is/are defined.
network services that have not been authorized or approved by authorization or approval processes are detected.
organization-defined actions are initiated when network services that have not been authorized or approved by authorization or approval processes are detected.
organizational systems and system components are monitored on an ongoing basis for anomalous or suspicious behavior.
